news.title: 美伊战火外溢，全球炸锅！
加拿大背包客在澳遭野犬袭击后溺亡
news.title0: Canadian teen died from drowning after dingo attack in Australia
news.content: 一名19岁加拿大背包客在澳大利亚昆士兰州海滩遭野犬袭击后溺水身亡，验尸官已确认死因。
news.content0: A Canadian backpacker died from drowning after she was attacked by dingoes on a popular Australian beach, a coroner has found.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 匈牙利扣押乌克兰银行员工及8000万美元现金
news.title0: Hungary confirms it is holding seven Ukrainian bank workers and $80m
news.content: 匈牙利税务当局以涉嫌洗钱为由，扣押了七名乌克兰银行员工及两辆运钞车，车上载有8000万美元现金和9公斤黄金。
news.content0: Hungary's tax authority has said it has arrested seven Ukrainians and two cash-transport vehicles on suspicion of money-laundering after Ukraine's foreign minister accused Budapest of taking them hostage.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 得州议员承认婚外情后放弃连任竞选
news.title0: Texas lawmaker drops re-election bid after admitting affair with aide
news.content: 美国得克萨斯州共和党众议员托尼·冈萨雷斯承认与一名自杀身亡的助手有染，随后宣布放弃连任竞选。
news.content0: Texas Republican congressman Tony Gonzales has dropped his re-election bid after admitting an affair, which he had previously denied, with a staff member who died by suicide.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 特朗普撤换国土安全部长诺姆
news.title0: Trump cuts his losses on Noem after controversial tenure at homeland security
news.content: 美国总统特朗普宣布，将撤换因争议不断而备受批评的国土安全部长克里斯蒂·诺姆，由俄克拉荷马州参议员马克韦恩·马林接任。
news.content0: Sooner or later, advisers in President Donald Trump's orbit all come to learn the same unwritten rule: no-one can outshine the boss.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 澳大利亚知名早餐广播节目因公开争吵停播
news.title0: Tears and cheers as controversial long-running Australian breakfast radio show implodes
news.content: 澳大利亚播出27年的知名早餐广播节目“凯尔与杰基O秀”因主持人在直播中公开激烈争吵而宣告结束，节目已被取消。
news.content0: It happens in offices around the world everyday: a workmate accusing another - rightly or wrongly - of not pulling their weight.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 阿塞拜疆称伊朗无人机袭击其飞地
news.title0: Azerbaijan furious with Iran as war spills over its border
news.content: 阿塞拜疆称伊朗无人机袭击了其位于伊朗北部的纳希切万飞地，造成平民受伤，总统阿利耶夫强烈谴责并要求伊朗道歉。
news.content0: The war in the Middle East has spilled over Iran's northern border, with Azerbaijan saying Iranian drones struck its Nakhchivan exclave on Thursday.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 美国AI公司被五角大楼列为供应链风险
news.title0: Anthropic says the Pentagon’s supply chain risk label will have less business impact than feared
news.content: 美国人工智能公司Anthropic被五角大楼列为“对美国国家安全的供应链风险”，但该公司表示实际业务影响小于预期。
news.content0: Anthropic on Thursday said a Pentagon designation of the AI company as a “supply chain risk to America’s national security” won’t impact their business partners as heavily as Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth implied last week.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 美国与委内瑞拉恢复外交关系
news.title0: U.S. Restarts Diplomatic Relations With Venezuela
news.content: 美国国务院宣布与委内瑞拉重新建立外交和领事关系，标志着两国关系在委总统马杜罗被捕后迅速解冻。
news.content0: The U.S. State Departmentannounced the re-establishmentof diplomatic and consular relations with Venezuela in a statement issued on Thursday evening, underscoring a rapid rapprochement between the two longtime foes since U.S. commandos captured President Nicolás Maduro two months ago.
news.author: NYTimes

news.title: 英国逮捕四名涉嫌为伊朗监视犹太社区的男子
news.title0: Four arrested on suspicion of spying on Jewish community for Iran, Met Police says
news.content: 伦敦警方逮捕了四名男子，他们涉嫌为伊朗从事间谍活动，对伦敦地区的犹太社区及个人进行监视。
news.content0: Four men suspected of carrying out surveillance on the Jewish community have been arrested on suspicion of spying for Iran, the Metropolitan Police has said.
news.author: Sky News
